testcase.name: test_signed_pdf_is_reachable_via_public_url

failure.message:
AssertionError: URL returned non-PDF body (ctype=text/html; charset=utf-8) assert (False or b'<!do' == b'%PDF' + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfeac15615070>('application/pdf') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfeac15615070> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.startswith + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') + where get = Headers({'date': 'Thu, 23 Apr 2026 04:39:01 GMT', 'content-type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'transfer-encoding': 'chunked', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'cf-ray': '9f0a2e977b270046-ORD', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'access-control-allow-origin': '*', 'cache-control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'server': 'cloudflare', 'vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'via': '1.1 google', 'access-control-max-age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=ijYoNcBmqX82Ce3cSvZ3gkz1At0UH9J9ShQtPTpwi0A-1776919141.040365-1.0.1.1-A4PMXSZm6VVSLHkScgcVm8faePRqyKJnTVaSoK3RdE92Yc.ODTUesiN4BZ99zS2RvjSfN4mgeOzgRUk2EJw.OmlGK7T6hqtL5a9yI5xPl4Yd_wVEOVmbYbHQTd9q_9ha; HttpOnly; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 05:09:01 GMT', 'x-robots-tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'content-encoding': 'gzip'}).get + where Headers({'date': 'Thu, 23 Apr 2026 04:39:01 GMT', 'content-type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'transfer-encoding': 'chunked', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'cf-ray': '9f0a2e977b270046-ORD', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'access-control-allow-origin': '*', 'cache-control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'server': 'cloudflare', 'vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'via': '1.1 google', 'access-control-max-age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=ijYoNcBmqX82Ce3cSvZ3gkz1At0UH9J9ShQtPTpwi0A-1776919141.040365-1.0.1.1-A4PMXSZm6VVSLHkScgcVm8faePRqyKJnTVaSoK3RdE92Yc.ODTUesiN4BZ99zS2RvjSfN4mgeOzgRUk2EJw.OmlGK7T6hqtL5a9yI5xPl4Yd_wVEOVmbYbHQTd9q_9ha; HttpOnly; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 05:09:01 GMT', 'x-robots-tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'content-encoding': 'gzip'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers
At index 0 diff: b'<' != b'%'
Full diff: - b'%PDF' + b'<!do')

testcase.failure: tests/test_session_4_extended.py:242: in test_signed_pdf_is_reachable_via_public_url assert (pdf.headers.get("content-type", "").startswith("application/pdf") E AssertionError: URL returned non-PDF body (ctype=text/html; charset=utf-8) E assert (False or b'<!do' == b'%PDF' E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfeac15615070>('application/pdf') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfeac15615070> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.startswith E + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') E + where get = Headers({'date': 'Thu, 23 Apr 2026 04:39:01 GMT', 'content-type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'transfer-encoding': 'chunked', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'cf-ray': '9f0a2e977b270046-ORD', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'access-control-allow-origin': '*', 'cache-control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'server': 'cloudflare', 'vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'via': '1.1 google', 'access-control-max-age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=ijYoNcBmqX82Ce3cSvZ3gkz1At0UH9J9ShQtPTpwi0A-1776919141.040365-1.0.1.1-A4PMXSZm6VVSLHkScgcVm8faePRqyKJnTVaSoK3RdE92Yc.ODTUesiN4BZ99zS2RvjSfN4mgeOzgRUk2EJw.OmlGK7T6hqtL5a9yI5xPl4Yd_wVEOVmbYbHQTd9q_9ha; HttpOnly; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 05:09:01 GMT', 'x-robots-tag': 'noindex, nofollow', 'content-encoding': 'gzip'}) = <Response [200 OK]>.headers E E At index 0 diff: b'<' != b'%' E E Full diff: E - b'%PDF' E + b'<!do')
